basic_details.job_title: ICAR CIRCOT Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Central Institute for Research on Cotton Technology (ICAR CIRCOT)
basic_details.short_information: Central Institute for Research on Cotton Technology (ICAR CIRCOT) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 1 Young Professional-I (YP-I) Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with Graduate or Diploma in Engineering/Technology, Working experience in the relevant field from recognized institute/laboratories qualification can directly attend the interview on 20 May 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Relaxation as per GOI rules for reserved candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate or Diploma in Engineering/Technology, Working experience in the relevant field from recognized institute/laboratories
qualification.details: Young Professional – I (YP-I): Essential: Graduate or Diploma in Engineering/Technology; Desirable: Working experience in the relevant field from recognized institute/laboratories.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date for the ICAR CIRCOT Young Professional-I (YP-I) Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the ICAR CIRCOT Young Professional-I (YP-I) recruitment is scheduled for 20th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they are present at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post?
faq.answer: The essential qualification is a Graduate or Diploma in Engineering/Technology. Desirable qualification includes working experience in the relevant field from a recognized institute or laboratories.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post is between 21 years and 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post at the Central Institute for Research on Cotton Technology (ICAR CIRCOT).

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person on the specified date and venue.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the ICAR CIRCOT Young Professional-I (YP-I) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and category certificates (if applicable), along with recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. What is the project duration for this contractual position?
faq.answer: The project duration for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) position is until 31st March 2027.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Walk-in Interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held in Nagpur, Maharashtra. The exact venue address will be mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the last date for the ICAR CIRCOT Young Professional-I (YP-I) Walk-in Interview?
